meta.name: PT2 Diagnostic Decision Tree
meta.description: Symptom-driven diagnostic and resolution routing for PT2 issues
meta.generated_from: Phase 1 heuristic extraction of 7,347 issues + Phase 2 LLM extraction of 10 richest conversations

error_raised.symptom: RuntimeError, TypeError, ValueError, AssertionError, or traceback

diagnostic_steps.action: Check if error occurs during tracing or codegen
Try aot_eager backend to isolate Inductor vs AOT issues
Minimize repro with Dynamo minifier

quick_fixes.condition: Error involves unbacked SymInt or data-dependent shapes

wrong_result.symptom: Compiled output differs from eager output (silent correctness issue)

diagnostic_steps.action: Compare eager vs compiled output element-wise
Test with aot_eager to isolate Inductor codegen
Check precision settings (TF32, precision casts)

quick_fixes.condition: Conv2d or CUDNN op mismatch, especially with shape padding
Mismatch with randomly initialized model — may be model instability, not compiler bug
quick_fixes.action: Test with pretrained weights; compare compile(float64) vs eager(float64)

quick_fixes.condition: NaN/accuracy collapse after N iterations with dynamic shapes
Non-deterministic correctness with KV cache roll/rotate operations
quick_fixes.action: Use scalar indexing instead of tensor indexing with roll

phase2_diagnostic_techniques.name: Multi-iteration accuracy tracking
phase2_diagnostic_techniques.description: Run N iterations and track error magnitude over time — delayed NaN appears after iteration 5+ as sudden jump from 1e-4 to ~300

phase2_diagnostic_techniques.name: Float32 vs Float64 comparison
phase2_diagnostic_techniques.description: Compare eager(float32) vs eager(float64) to distinguish model numerical instability from compiler bugs

phase2_diagnostic_techniques.name: aot_eager_decomp_partition isolation
phase2_diagnostic_techniques.description: Use backend='aot_eager_decomp_partition' to isolate decomposition bugs from Inductor codegen bugs

crash.symptom: SIGSEGV, SIGABRT, core dump, or illegal instruction

diagnostic_steps.action: Get stack trace with faulthandler
Check if crash is in Triton kernel or C++ runtime
Test with eager backend to confirm compile-specific

graph_break.symptom: Dynamo graph break causing performance loss or unexpected behavior

diagnostic_steps.action: Identify graph break location and reason
Check TORCH_LOGS for graph break details

recompilation.symptom: Excessive recompilation, guard failures, or shape specialization

diagnostic_steps.action: Check guard failure log to identify which guard is failing
Identify if input shape variation is causing recompilation

memory_issue.symptom: OOM, memory leak, or excessive memory usage under compile

diagnostic_steps.action: Check if OOM is from compile-time memory or runtime memory
Try expandable segments to reduce fragmentation

quick_fixes.condition: Inference-only but compile reserves memory for backward

diagnostic_steps.action: Profile compilation time breakdown
Check if autotuning is the bottleneck

quick_fixes.condition: Using mode='max-autotune' with many kernel variants

export_failure.symptom: torch.export or AOTI produces errors or incorrect output
export_failure.note: New category from Phase 2 extraction — frequency not yet counted from full corpus

diagnostic_steps.action: Determine if failure is in export, AOTI compile, or AOTI runtime
diagnostic_steps.tool: Try torch.export.export() alone first, then torch.compile() on exported program

diagnostic_steps.action: Check for data-dependent dynamic shapes (DDEs) in model code
For silent degradation: compare AOTI output vs torch.compile output
diagnostic_steps.tool: torch.compile surfaces errors that AOTI silently masks

diagnostic_steps.action: Check exported program guards for static shape leakage
diagnostic_steps.tool: Inspect guards — look for Eq() constraints baking in dummy input dimensions

quick_fixes.condition: Detection model with NMS/ROI data-dependent control flow
AOTI output degraded — position encoding model with static pos_embed
quick_fixes.action: Match export dummy input shape to inference shape

perf_regression.symptom: Compiled code slower than eager (negative speedup)

diagnostic_steps.action: Profile compiled vs eager execution
Check for excessive graph breaks degrading performance

hang.symptom: Process hangs, never completes compilation or execution

diagnostic_steps.action: Check if hang is during compilation or execution
diagnostic_steps.tool: Ctrl+C to get stack trace, check if in Triton autotuning

diagnostic_steps.action: Try with cache disabled to rule out cache corruption
